channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: mattpocock /skills | Shell | N/A
item.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: JCodesMore /ai-website-cloner-template | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

item.title: firecrawl /firecrawl | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale. 🔥

item.title: ZhuLinsen /daily_stock_analysis | Python | N/A
item.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

item.title: DeusData /codebase-memory-mcp | C | N/A
item.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

item.title: bytedance /deer-flow | Python | N/A
item.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

item.title: tursodatabase /turso | Rust | N/A
item.description: Turso is an in-process SQL database, compatible with SQLite.

item.title: heygen-com /hyperframes | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.

item.title: garrytan /gstack | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

item.title: Stirling-Tools /Stirling-PDF | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: #1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

item.title: penpot /penpot | Clojure | N/A
item.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

item.title: mukul975 /Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills | Python | N/A
item.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

item.title: jamiepine /voicebox | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: palmier-io /palmier-pro | Swift | N/A
item.description: macOS video editor built for AI

item.title: calesthio /OpenMontage | Python | N/A
item.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
